risks.title: Pattern table may drift from implementation
risks.mitigation: Import inferLayerFromPath directly from compiled output; test actual export, not a local copy.

risks.title: Windows path separators in test inputs
risks.mitigation: Use forward-slash paths in test inputs — the function normalizes with .replace(/\\/g, '/'). Confirm normalization in test assertions.

candidates.note: Both functions are exported; test via the compiled header-generator.test.ts describe block

decision_records.decision: Add tests in the existing header-generator.test.ts rather than a new file
decision_records.rationale: inferLayerFromPath and inferCapabilityFromPath are part of the header-generator module. Co-locating tests keeps the test surface coherent and avoids a new test file discovery entry.
